name: AgentFinance - Economic Calendar Block

nodes.name: Fetch Economic Calendar
nodes.notes: Replaced Investing.com with TradingEconomics API. Set TRADINGECONOMICS_KEY env var instead of INVESTING_API_KEY.

parameters.name: Filter High Impact Events
parameters.notes: Updated to parse TradingEconomics JSON format instead of Investing.com

description: Monitors economic calendar every 30 minutes, activates trade blocks 30 min before high-impact events, alerts on exposed positions
